Guinevere.Toddler.Dialog.Mon: Mom said I can have my own sword when I am older!#$b#I want to fight monsters like you in the mines and stuff!$1
Guinevere.Toddler.Dialog.Tue: Hm, I am learning to write cursive but it's hard. Mom said it's okay to take things slow.#$b#I am practicing the H right now!
Guinevere.Toddler.Dialog.Wed: I went to the beach the other day. Mom said there's treasure in sand hidden away!#$b#I gonna find it all.
Guinevere.Toddler.Dialog.Thu: I am currently making a map! It's jsut of our farm but it is good practice.#$b#Next is a map of the town!$1
Guinevere.Toddler.Dialog.Fri: When a tree falls in the forest and there's no one to witness it...did it actually fall?$3
Guinevere.Toddler.Dialog.Sat: The trees on our farm are pretty big! I climbed a few before.#$b#Don't worry, Mom caught me each time when I fell down.
Guinevere.Toddler.Dialog.Sun: When I am older I will inherit moms cool boots!$1#$b#That's what she told me! I really, really like her boots, hehe.
Guinevere.Toddler.Gift.Loved: Oh, what's this?#$b#Thank you, I love it!$1
Guinevere.Toddler.Gift.Hated: Yuck! Why are you giving this to me?$2
Guinevere.Movie.With_Parent_Before: I can't wait to see what you picked!$1
Guinevere.Movie.With_Parent_Script: %Guinevere eagerly watches the movie, tugging at your sleeve.
Guinevere.Movie.With_Parent_After: Wow, thank you for inviting me!#$b#I'm happy spending time with you!$1
Guinevere.Movie.love_Before: I saw the movie psoter!#$b#I can't wait to watch it.$1
Guinevere.Movie.love_After: This was fun! I really liked it!$1
Guinevere.Movie.like_After: Thank you for watching this movie with me.$1
Guinevere.Movie.dislike_Before: Hm, I'm not so sure about this...$3
Guinevere.Toddler.Dialog.Farmhouse.1: I'm sleepy...but I don't wanna nap.#$b#There's so much fun stuff to do.
Guinevere.Toddler.Dialog.Farmhouse.2: Mom showed me how to dodge fast attacks!#$b#She threw some plushies and I jumped around and it was fun!#$b#She said I am too young to use a sword though, aw...
Guinevere.Toddler.Dialog.Farmhouse.3: When I grow up I want to have a big treasure that I can hide and be all smug about!
Guinevere.Toddler.Dialog.Farmhouse.4: I watched Jas and Vincent play in the forest today.#$b#They almost slipped into the lake so i grabbed then jsut in time.#$b#When I told Mom she said she's going to teach me how to swim!
Guinevere.Toddler.Dialog.Farmhouse.5: I pulled out all the weeds I saw on the farm!#$b#I am a good helper, yes?
Guinevere.Toddler.Dialog.Farmhouse.6: Can we have some sweets today? Pretty please!
Guinevere.Toddler.Dialog.Farmhouse.7: I dug in the mud outside and found some bones and stuff!#$b#Mom said it's jsut some animal bones....I really wanted to find artifacts like you, aw.
Guinevere.Toddler.Dialog.Farmhouse.8: I made a little straw doll! Miss Penny showed me how to do it the other day.
Guinevere.Toddler.Dialog.Farmhouse.9: That Blacksmith guy told me I can't have a little knife when I asked...he said something bout Mom and you will have a scary talk with him if he gave me one. Why?
Guinevere.Toddler.Dialog.Farmhouse.10: Mom showed me a few maps today!$1#$b#I wanna make maps like her!
Guinevere.Festivals.spring13: Eggs don't interest me...but I like watching you collect them.$1#$b#Will you win this time?
Guinevere.Festivals.spring24: Mom told me about the first time you two danced.#$b#Do you think I will get to dance here one day too?
Guinevere.Festivals.summer11: Hm, I like your food the most!#$b#Let's see how everyone together can make.$1
Guinevere.Festivals.summer28: Jellies! IThey look just like the jelly you can eat. Can I touch them?$3
Guinevere.Festivals.fall16: Hmmmm! Mom just took that strength test and everyone was impressed.#$b#I tried too but I couldn't even lift the hammer....$2
Guinevere.Festivals.fall27: Look at those mosters over there...I wanna fight them!
Guinevere.Festivals.winter8: Can I try fishing too?#$b#It looks fun.
Guinevere.Festivals.winter25: What do you think you're getting this year? This is so exciting!$1
